initialize_release.description: initialize a release instance A as a registered release
preconditions: I can only initialize a release instance A as a registered release if it is not the case that A is a registered release and it is not the case that A is finalized
effects: Once I initialize a release instance A as a registered release, it is the case that A is a registered release

assign_release_to_wave.description: assign a release instance A to a rollout wave B
preconditions: I can only assign a release instance A to a rollout wave B if it is the case that A is a registered release and a wave is available for B and the release instance A is allowed in the rollout wave B
I can only assign a release instance A to a rollout wave B if it is not the case that A is assigned
effects: Once I assign a release instance A to a rollout wave B, it is the case that A is assigned to the rollout wave B and A is assigned
Once I assign a release instance A to a rollout wave B, it is not the case anymore that a wave is available for B

unschedule_release_from_wave.description: unschedule a release instance A from a rollout wave B
preconditions: I can only unschedule a release instance A from a rollout wave B if it is the case that A is assigned to the rollout wave B
I can only unschedule a release instance A from a rollout wave B if it is not the case that the deployment of A is completed and it is not the case that the promotion of A is approved
effects: Once I unschedule a release instance A from a rollout wave B, it is the case that a wave is available for B

Once I unschedule a release instance A from a rollout wave B, it is not the case anymore that A is assigned to the rollout wave B and it is not the case anymore that A is assigned and it is not the case anymore that A has its release readiness validated and it is not the case anymore that operator checks are completed for A and it is not the case anymore that approval for A is recorded and it is not the case anymore that A is ready for finalization and it is not the case anymore that A is pending verification

bind_runbook_to_release.description: bind a runbook B to a release instance A
preconditions: I can only bind a runbook B to a release instance A if it is the case that A is a registered release and B is available
effects: Once I bind a runbook B to a release instance A, it is the case that A has a release bound runbook B
Once I bind a runbook B to a release instance A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

unbind_runbook_from_release.description: unbind a runbook B from a release instance A
preconditions: I can only unbind a runbook B from a release instance A if it is the case that A has a release bound runbook B
effects: Once I unbind a runbook B from a release instance A, it is the case that B is available
Once I unbind a runbook B from a release instance A, it is not the case anymore that A has a release bound runbook B

validate_runbook_readiness.description: validate readiness of a runbook B for a release instance A
preconditions: I can only validate readiness of a runbook B for a release instance A if it is the case that A is a registered release and A is assigned and A has a release bound runbook B
I can only validate readiness of a runbook B for a release instance A if it is not the case that A has its release readiness validated
effects: Once I validate readiness of a runbook B for a release instance A, it is the case that A has its release readiness validated

apply_approval_for_release.description: apply approval for a release instance A by an approver B
preconditions: I can only apply approval for a release instance A by an approver B if it is the case that A is a registered release and A is assigned and B is available
I can only apply approval for a release instance A by an approver B if it is not the case that A has its release readiness validated
effects: Once I apply approval for a release instance A by an approver B, it is the case that A has its release readiness validated and approval for A is recorded
Once I apply approval for a release instance A by an approver B, it is not the case anymore that B is available

operator_precheck_with_runbook.description: perform operator precheck for a release instance A using a runbook B by an operator C
preconditions: I can only perform operator precheck for a release instance A using a runbook B by an operator C if it is the case that A has its release readiness validated and A is assigned and A has a release bound runbook B and the operator C is available
I can only perform operator precheck for a release instance A using a runbook B by an operator C if it is not the case that operator checks are completed for A
effects: Once I perform operator precheck for a release instance A using a runbook B by an operator C, it is the case that operator checks are completed for A
Once I perform operator precheck for a release instance A using a runbook B by an operator C, it is not the case anymore that approval for A is recorded

assert_rollback_template_available.description: assert that a rollback template B is available for a release instance A
preconditions: I can only assert that a rollback template B is available for a release instance A if it is the case that A is assigned and B is authorized for A
I can only assert that a rollback template B is available for a release instance A if it is not the case that operator checks are completed for A
effects: Once I assert that a rollback template B is available for a release instance A, it is the case that operator checks are completed for A
Once I assert that a rollback template B is available for a release instance A, it is not the case anymore that approval for A is recorded

reserve_component_for_release.description: reserve a component B for a release instance A
preconditions: I can only reserve a component B for a release instance A if it is the case that A is a registered release and B is available and the release instance A is bound to the component B
effects: Once I reserve a component B for a release instance A, it is the case that B is reserved for A
Once I reserve a component B for a release instance A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

release_component_reservation.description: release reservation of a component B for a release instance A
preconditions: I can only release reservation of a component B for a release instance A if it is the case that B is reserved for A
effects: Once I release reservation of a component B for a release instance A, it is the case that B is available
Once I release reservation of a component B for a release instance A, it is not the case anymore that B is reserved for A

reserve_dependency_for_release.description: reserve a service dependency B for a release instance A
preconditions: I can only reserve a service dependency B for a release instance A if it is the case that A is a registered release and B is available and the release instance A is bound to the service dependency B
effects: Once I reserve a service dependency B for a release instance A, it is the case that B is reserved for A
Once I reserve a service dependency B for a release instance A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

release_dependency_reservation.description: release reservation of a service dependency B for a release instance A
preconditions: I can only release reservation of a service dependency B for a release instance A if it is the case that B is reserved for A
effects: Once I release reservation of a service dependency B for a release instance A, it is the case that B is available
Once I release reservation of a service dependency B for a release instance A, it is not the case anymore that B is reserved for A

reserve_infra_component_for_release.description: reserve an infrastructure component B for a release instance A
preconditions: I can only reserve an infrastructure component B for a release instance A if it is the case that A is a registered release and B is available and the release instance A is bound to the infrastructure component B
effects: Once I reserve an infrastructure component B for a release instance A, it is the case that B is reserved for A
Once I reserve an infrastructure component B for a release instance A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

release_infrastructure_component_reserva.description: release reservation of an infrastructure component B for a release instance A
preconditions: I can only release reservation of an infrastructure component B for a release instance A if it is the case that B is reserved for A
effects: Once I release reservation of an infrastructure component B for a release instance A, it is the case that B is available
Once I release reservation of an infrastructure component B for a release instance A, it is not the case anymore that B is reserved for A

reserve_configuration_snapshot_for_relea.description: reserve a configuration snapshot B for a release instance A
preconditions: I can only reserve a configuration snapshot B for a release instance A if it is the case that A is a registered release and the configuration snapshot B is available and the release instance A is bound to the configuration snapshot B
effects: Once I reserve a configuration snapshot B for a release instance A, it is the case that B is reserved for A
Once I reserve a configuration snapshot B for a release instance A, it is not the case anymore that the configuration snapshot B is available

release_configuration_snapshot_reservati.description: release reservation of a configuration snapshot B for a release instance A
preconditions: I can only release reservation of a configuration snapshot B for a release instance A if it is the case that B is reserved for A
effects: Once I release reservation of a configuration snapshot B for a release instance A, it is the case that the configuration snapshot B is available
Once I release reservation of a configuration snapshot B for a release instance A, it is not the case anymore that B is reserved for A

execute_deployment_to_target.description: execute deployment of a release instance A to a deployment target B with a component C and a service dependency D
preconditions: I can only execute deployment of a release instance A to a deployment target B with a component C and a service dependency D if it is the case that A is assigned and C is reserved for A and D is reserved for A and a target is available for B and the release instance A is bound to the deployment target B
I can only execute deployment of a release instance A to a deployment target B with a component C and a service dependency D if it is not the case that the deployment of A is completed
effects: Once I execute deployment of a release instance A to a deployment target B with a component C and a service dependency D, it is the case that A is deployed to B and the deployment of A is completed
Once I execute deployment of a release instance A to a deployment target B with a component C and a service dependency D, it is not the case anymore that a target is available for B

execute_deployment_with_infra_resources.description: execute deployment of a release instance A to a deployment target B using an infrastructure component C and an infrastructure resource D
preconditions: I can only execute deployment of a release instance A to a deployment target B using an infrastructure component C and an infrastructure resource D if it is the case that A is assigned and C is reserved for A and the infrastructure resource D is available and a target is available for B and the release instance A is bound to the deployment target B and the release instance A is bound to the infrastructure resource D

I can only execute deployment of a release instance A to a deployment target B using an infrastructure component C and an infrastructure resource D if it is not the case that the deployment of A is completed
effects: Once I execute deployment of a release instance A to a deployment target B using an infrastructure component C and an infrastructure resource D, it is the case that A is deployed to B and the deployment of A is completed and A is pending verification and approval for A is recorded

Once I execute deployment of a release instance A to a deployment target B using an infrastructure component C and an infrastructure resource D, it is not the case anymore that a target is available for B and it is not the case anymore that the infrastructure resource D is available

clear_post_deploy_verification.description: clear post deployment verification for a release instance A using a component B and a service dependency C
preconditions: I can only clear post deployment verification for a release instance A using a component B and a service dependency C if it is the case that the deployment of A is completed and A is pending verification and B is reserved for A and C is reserved for A
effects: Once I clear post deployment verification for a release instance A using a component B and a service dependency C, it is not the case anymore that A is pending verification and it is not the case anymore that approval for A is recorded

approve_promotion.description: approve promotion for a release instance A using a component B and a service dependency C with a dev team D
preconditions: I can only approve promotion for a release instance A using a component B and a service dependency C with a dev team D if it is the case that operator checks are completed for A and the deployment of A is completed and B is reserved for A and C is reserved for A and the release instance A is associated with the stakeholder group D

I can only approve promotion for a release instance A using a component B and a service dependency C with a dev team D if it is not the case that approval for A is recorded and it is not the case that the promotion of A is approved
effects: Once I approve promotion for a release instance A using a component B and a service dependency C with a dev team D, it is the case that the promotion of A is approved

ops_approve_promotion.description: ops approve promotion for a release instance A using an infrastructure component B and a configuration snapshot C with an ops team D
preconditions: I can only ops approve promotion for a release instance A using an infrastructure component B and a configuration snapshot C with an ops team D if it is the case that operator checks are completed for A and the deployment of A is completed and B is reserved for A and C is reserved for A and the release instance A is associated with the stakeholder group D

I can only ops approve promotion for a release instance A using an infrastructure component B and a configuration snapshot C with an ops team D if it is not the case that the promotion of A is approved
effects: Once I ops approve promotion for a release instance A using an infrastructure component B and a configuration snapshot C with an ops team D, it is the case that the promotion of A is approved and approval for A is recorded

finalize_promotion_stage.description: finalize promotion stage for a release instance A with a component B and a service dependency C
preconditions: I can only finalize promotion stage for a release instance A with a component B and a service dependency C if it is the case that the promotion of A is approved and approval for A is recorded and B is reserved for A and C is reserved for A
effects: Once I finalize promotion stage for a release instance A with a component B and a service dependency C, it is the case that A is ready for finalization

Once I finalize promotion stage for a release instance A with a component B and a service dependency C, it is not the case anymore that approval for A is recorded and it is not the case anymore that operator checks are completed for A and it is not the case anymore that A is pending verification

reenable_operator_checks.description: reenable operator checks for a release instance A using a runbook B with an operator C
preconditions: I can only reenable operator checks for a release instance A using a runbook B with an operator C if it is the case that A is ready for finalization and the promotion of A is approved and A is assigned and A has a release bound runbook B and the operator C is available
I can only reenable operator checks for a release instance A using a runbook B with an operator C if it is not the case that operator checks are completed for A
effects: Once I reenable operator checks for a release instance A using a runbook B with an operator C, it is the case that operator checks are completed for A

mark_runbook_linked_for_monitoring.description: mark a release instance A as linked for monitoring using a runbook B
preconditions: I can only mark a release instance A as linked for monitoring using a runbook B if it is the case that the promotion of A is approved and operator checks are completed for A and A has a release bound runbook B
I can only mark a release instance A as linked for monitoring using a runbook B if it is not the case that approval for A is recorded and it is not the case that A is linked to monitoring
effects: Once I mark a release instance A as linked for monitoring using a runbook B, it is the case that A is linked to monitoring

mark_approver_linked_for_monitoring.description: mark a release instance A as linked for monitoring with an approver B
preconditions: I can only mark a release instance A as linked for monitoring with an approver B if it is the case that the promotion of A is approved and operator checks are completed for A and B is available
I can only mark a release instance A as linked for monitoring with an approver B if it is not the case that approval for A is recorded and it is not the case that A is linked to monitoring
effects: Once I mark a release instance A as linked for monitoring with an approver B, it is the case that A is linked to monitoring
Once I mark a release instance A as linked for monitoring with an approver B, it is not the case anymore that B is available

bind_rollback_template_to_release.description: bind a rollback template B to a release instance A
preconditions: I can only bind a rollback template B to a release instance A if it is the case that A is linked to monitoring and the rollback template B is available and A has a rollback template link to B
effects: Once I bind a rollback template B to a release instance A, it is the case that the rollback template B is committed for the release instance A
Once I bind a rollback template B to a release instance A, it is not the case anymore that the rollback template B is available

authorize_cross_variant_rollback.description: authorize a rollback template C for cross variant rollback from a canary release variant B to a full release variant A
preconditions: I can only authorize a rollback template C for cross variant rollback from a canary release variant B to a full release variant A if it is the case that A is a registered release and A is a full variant and A has a rollback template C and the rollback template C is committed for the release instance B
I can only authorize a rollback template C for cross variant rollback from a canary release variant B to a full release variant A if it is not the case that C is authorized for A
effects: Once I authorize a rollback template C for cross variant rollback from a canary release variant B to a full release variant A, it is the case that C is authorized for A

start_post_deployment_monitoring.description: start post deployment monitoring for a release instance A using a runbook B by an operator C
preconditions: I can only start post deployment monitoring for a release instance A using a runbook B by an operator C if it is the case that A is a registered release and A is a full variant and operator checks are completed for A and A is linked to monitoring and A has a release bound runbook B and the operator C is available
I can only start post deployment monitoring for a release instance A using a runbook B by an operator C if it is not the case that monitoring has started for A
effects: Once I start post deployment monitoring for a release instance A using a runbook B by an operator C, it is the case that monitoring has started for A

finalize_canary_release.description: finalize canary release for a release instance A
preconditions: I can only finalize canary release for a release instance A if it is the case that A is a canary variant and A is a registered release and A is assigned and the deployment of A is completed and the promotion of A is approved and A is linked to monitoring and operator checks are completed for A
I can only finalize canary release for a release instance A if it is not the case that A is finalized
effects: Once I finalize canary release for a release instance A, it is the case that A is finalized

finalize_full_release_with_template.description: finalize full release for a release instance A using a rollback template B
preconditions: I can only finalize full release for a release instance A using a rollback template B if it is the case that A is a full variant and A is a registered release and A is assigned and the deployment of A is completed and the promotion of A is approved and A is linked to monitoring and operator checks are completed for A and B is authorized for A
I can only finalize full release for a release instance A using a rollback template B if it is not the case that A is finalized
effects: Once I finalize full release for a release instance A using a rollback template B, it is the case that A is finalized

finalize_release_after_monitoring.description: finalize release for a release instance A after monitoring has started
preconditions: I can only finalize release for a release instance A after monitoring has started if it is the case that A is a full variant and A is a registered release and A is assigned and the deployment of A is completed and the promotion of A is approved and A is linked to monitoring and operator checks are completed for A and monitoring has started for A
I can only finalize release for a release instance A after monitoring has started if it is not the case that A is finalized
effects: Once I finalize release for a release instance A after monitoring has started, it is the case that A is finalized

action_nl_templates.initialize_release: initialize release instance {?release_instance} as a registered release

action_nl_templates.unschedule_release_from_wave: unschedule release instance {?release_instance} from rollout wave {?rollout_wave}

action_nl_templates.release_infrastructure_component_reserva: release reservation of infrastructure component {?infrastructure_component} for release instance {?release_instance}
action_nl_templates.reserve_configuration_snapshot_for_relea: reserve configuration snapshot {?configuration_snapshot} for release instance {?release_instance}
action_nl_templates.release_configuration_snapshot_reservati: release reservation of configuration snapshot {?configuration_snapshot} for release instance {?release_instance}
action_nl_templates.execute_deployment_to_target: execute deployment of release instance {?release_instance} to deployment target {?deployment_target} with component {?component} and service dependency {?service_dependency}
action_nl_templates.execute_deployment_with_infra_resources: execute deployment of release instance {?release_instance} to deployment target {?deployment_target} using infrastructure component {?infrastructure_component} and infrastructure resource {?infrastructure_resource}
action_nl_templates.clear_post_deploy_verification: clear post-deployment verification for release instance {?release_instance} using component {?component} and service dependency {?service_dependency}
action_nl_templates.approve_promotion: approve promotion for release instance {?release_instance} using component {?component} and service dependency {?service_dependency} with dev team {?dev_team}

action_nl_templates.reenable_operator_checks: reenable operator checks for release instance {?release_instance} using runbook {?runbook} with operator {?operator}
action_nl_templates.mark_runbook_linked_for_monitoring: mark release instance {?release_instance} as linked for monitoring using runbook {?runbook}
action_nl_templates.mark_approver_linked_for_monitoring: mark release instance {?release_instance} as linked for monitoring with approver {?approver}
action_nl_templates.bind_rollback_template_to_release: bind rollback template {?rollback_template} to release instance {?release_instance}
action_nl_templates.authorize_cross_variant_rollback: authorize rollback template {?rollback_template} for cross-variant rollback from canary release variant {?canary_release_variant} to full release variant {?full_release_variant}
action_nl_templates.start_post_deployment_monitoring: start post-deployment monitoring for release instance {?release_instance} using runbook {?runbook} by operator {?operator}
action_nl_templates.finalize_canary_release: finalize canary release for release instance {?release_instance}
action_nl_templates.finalize_full_release_with_template: finalize full release for release instance {?release_instance} using rollback template {?rollback_template}
action_nl_templates.finalize_release_after_monitoring: finalize release for release instance {?release_instance} after monitoring has started

type_hierarchy: Everything that is a entity is also a object

Everything that is a release instance or a rollout wave or a deployment target or a service dependency or a component or a infrastructure component or a runbook or a approver or a rollback template or a operator or a infrastructure resource or a configuration snapshot or a stakeholder group is also a entity
Everything that is a dev team or a ops team is also a stakeholder group
Everything that is a canary release variant or a full release variant is also a release instance
